@graph.name: TOXFREE® LSZH OUTDOOR H07Z1-K type 2 CuSn
@graph.description: Grounding cable with tinned copper conductor. ACCORDING TO: EN 50525-3-31 / UNE 211002. TOXFREE® LSZH OUTDOOR H07Z1-K type 2 CuSn is a cable specially designed for grounding in outdoor installations. The tinned copper conductor and special insulation compounds make it highly resistant to corrosion and UV degradation, preventing galvanic corrosion when connecting dissimilar metals. LSZH halogen-free cable with the highest CPR classification (B2ca-s1a, d1, a1) and UV protection according to solar standard EN 50618.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Solar & Photovoltaic Projects)

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Tinned copper, class 5 (flexible) according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: LSZH polyolefin, UV resistant according to EN 50525-3-31

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Service Temperature
additionalProperty.value: -40 (fixed and protected installations)

additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 / IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: Fire Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Fire non-propagation according to EN 60332-3-24 / IEC 60332-3-24 and EN 50399

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: B2ca-s1a, d1, a1 according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Halogen Free
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free according to EN 60754-1 / IEC 60754-1

additionalProperty.value: Low corrosive gases emission according to EN 60754-2 / IEC 60754-2

additionalProperty.name: Low Smoke Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke emission according to UNE-EN 61034 / IEC 61034

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 5x cable diameter
